_comment: Map of cuisine id -> array of Google Place IDs. Cuisine ids must match src/cuisines.js (e.g. 'thai', 'middle-eastern', 'chinese'). Get a Place ID from Google Maps: open the restaurant page, click 'Share', and the long string after place/ in the URL is its Place ID (starts with 'ChIJ'). Or use the Place ID Finder: https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/places/web-service/place-id
